title: Nachamaniy #5167
definition:
Nahamani = "merciful"

 1) a chief man among the exiles who returned from Babylon with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nahamani = "merciful"

 1) a chief man among the exiles who returned from Babylon with Zerubbabel

    NASB:  compassionate, an Isr. of Nehemiahs time
